JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-18-2014 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 611 Judge Lyy O'Malley Taylor. Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha. Not reported.
09:30am The cause comes on calendar regularly as assigned by Dept. 206/501 for 3 days Jury Trial.
Arthur Lipton, Esq. for and with the Plaintiff Vena Shotiveyaratana, no appearance by co-plaintiff Mark Wannaviroj. Defendant Aleksandr Rabinovich present in pro per.

12:30pm Court is adjourned.
